Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: When we got back to our room about 3pm after being out all day our room had not been cleaned About an hour later they called and asked if we wanted room service I just asked for fresh towels which were delivered right away No big deal   Early check in was no problem Desk staff were friendly and spoke excellent english Irene was especially helpful with a hand drawn map of the area They arranged an airport shuttle for our early morning flight

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Breakfast was not included but I ate out with friends for breakfast anyway   The room was gorgeous clean comfortable and very charming The location was fantastic

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: My husband and I stayed for a week at the end of September We loved the Hotel the staff and the location The Hotel was very well appointed very comfortable and very clean Our room was a generous size with a large TV and the bathroom was lovely We loved the bed linens quite luxurious after a day of wandering The best quality of this hotel is their staff everyone was very friendly helpful and simply couldn t do enough for us We highly recommend and would definitely stay with Hotel Academie on our next trip to Paris Thank you Hotel Academie

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The room was really tiny compared to similar hotels it was a little expensive for the size of room But it was immaculate in cleanliness and freshness of decor etc  The location was excellent near to Boulevard St Germain some nearby restaurants and food shops Also could walk to the river and transport

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The Hotel was really nice small but functional it was very close to the centre of St Germain s and close to lots of restaurants the bedroom was very comfortable and I would go back

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: I cant think of anything that wasnt perfect  My daughter and I were visiting Paris for two days on the way to Greece and found this boutique hotel on booking com It was very french very beautiful and charming close to everything for walking The rooms couldnt have been nicer The bathroom was luxurious and stylish and bed was big and comfortable There was a lovely breakfast room with a full buffet or the choice of just pastry and coffee which was perfect for starting a long day of touring We loved the location near the metro St Germain and many good restaurants and museums The hotel lobby clerk arranged for a van ride to Charles De Gualle that was very reasonable and on time which made our travel so much easier an relaxing All in all a perfect place to stay for a visit to Paris

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: I didn t like the manner the manager from the lobby spoke to me when I informed her about dirty sheet She said It is just impossible I said that unfortunately it is possible and showed her the picture I made She said No it is just wet But it wasn t wet it was just dirty I don t like the idea when the manager doesn t believe me and I need to spend my time trying to prove that there is a mistake Finally she believed my words and apologized for this But I was dissatisfied as the whole dialog was unacceptable   The location of the hotel is great I liked the design of the hotel and its rooms

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Bedbugs contamination and failure to proceed to agreed refund Contamination punaises de lit et refus de proc der au remboursement promis Unfortunately I was bitten by bedbugs during my 2 night stay at Hotel Academie at the end of August 2016 I was able to prove it having found insects and cocoons in the bed in the morning The receptionist agreed to a full refund for my first night stay giving me a refund receipt and indicating that a bank transfer would be formalised when her manager gets back after my departure Hotel Academie recently sent me an email informing me that they refuse to implement the refund They argue that I have implicitly rejected this proposal when I agreed to stay at the Hotel though in another room which I had previously inspected and which did not appear to be contaminated for the second night of my pre paid reservation Not only was the room I slept in the first night infected Luxury room with spa but I am being denied a refund which was agreed to and put down in writing in exchange for the inconvenience This is very bad practice and service I therefore find it important to inform future customers J esp re sinc rement que les chambres contamin es seront trait es par des professionnels et que les autres clients affect s par la situation recevront un traitement juste et appropri dans les circonstances   Well located renovated

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Clearer descriptions about breakfast options would have been good We thought we chose the continental breakfast only to find out the hot breakfast option was the only one that included the cheese and cold cuts of meat After choosing the cheese and cold meat we were charged the hot full breakfast although we didn t select any of the hot food Also our tea or coffee wasn t replenished through each day s cleaning With only 2 satchels each of the coffee and tea at the start of our stay these were not adequate for our 4 night stay   Boutique styled hotel It is close to Louvre restaurants and the hop on hop bus stop and easy to walk to the many nearby food outlets The rooms and storage space is very small the room suited our needs over our stay and were very clean

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Building outside was a tad loud in the morning but out of the hotels control   Beautiful hotel great location nicely furnished Lovely Italian receptionist I forget her name sorry super happy person She was extremely bubbly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The only negative being you could hear noise from the next room   Location was excellent whilst also being in a quiet street but near both the louvre and Notre Dame Staff especially Patricia were very helpful Interconnecting room was a bonus and the rooms a good size Both rooms were immaculate

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: This is a charming little boutique hotel in the heart of Paris The rooms were wonderfully decorated and spotless The reception staff was always welcoming you with a smile and willing to help you with any request

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain

Full_Review: Nothing wrong with our stay but they will need to keep tip top maintenance of the white decor   Small rooms but we ll designed Luxury fittings in the bathroom and very good shower Bed comfortable Everything you need for a short stay Tea and coffee making facilities in the room a good touch wi fi easy to connect and strong Public areas very tastefully decorated A nice location in St germaine

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: You could do without the disinfectant process after showering Very annoying esp after midnight doubtful effect   We had an awesome experience First rate staff clean rooms beautiful Saint Germain ambience

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The room and closet space was extremely limited even for the content of 2 carry ons   The breakfast was excellent The quiet and sunny corner of the hotel location is a plus and the staff goes out of their way in their kindness

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Nothing to report  Wonderful boutique hotel in Saint Germain Paris Location best ever Walking distance to top attractions as well as many less known ones Staff always went out of their way to help you Just the little things like remembering your name every time nothing too difficult Always greeted with a smile by ALL staff Ambience of hotel made you feel relaxed an welcome from the moment you stepped in the door Felt very safe in location during current high terrorist alert Will definitely stay there again next visit to Paris Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Staff were amazing very friendly and helpful Our room was beautiful modern and very clean Will be staying when we visit Paris again Lovely area with lots of shops and cafes

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Honestly nothing I really would like to offer ideas for improvement but the hotel was perfect for us Our room was not large but we didn t expect it to be Room size was not important to us   The entire front desk staff was very warm and friendly They made us feel welcome from the moment we walked in after a long overnight flight and one of us hates to fly They really went out of their way to treat us well the entire stay The hotel itself was very clean and nicely decorated and the location could not have been better It s right in the heart of St Germaine but also on a quiet street We walked everywhere we wanted to go

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: We like everything about our stay   The Staff Extremely positive helpful interactive just delightful The hotel is in a perfect location to walk to Paris attractions and is situated near fantastic restaurants The hotel is exceptionally clean

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Man at reception on weekend made offensive accusations about my credit card and barked threateningly and delayed my departure unreasonably when the hotel s malfunctioning credit card scanner was to blame My card was immediately accepted when the number was entered manually His behavior was unacceptable Also the room s heat source is oddly located inside the closet It wasn t a significant issue in late spring other than potentially dangerously overheating a GoreTex jacket There was a small hole in the duvet cover Reception did not warn me when I arrived that the room safe had been removed for repair   Location is excellent Nicely renovated room was small but reasonably comfortable for one Most staff were friendly courteous and efficient

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The very noisy spa baths self cleaning And the adjoining room could hear snoring sneezing tv and talking   The opulence and location and the helpfulness of the staff Very comfy beds

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Wish there was space to sit and read in the room Well designed but tight quarters   Location convenient to Musee dOrsay Notre Dame Batobus yet on quiet street Great bakery and excellent restaurant Le Perron just steps away Hotel was newly renovated and offered modern amenities Irene and Patrice at the front desk were welcoming and most helpful

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The rooms are ridiculously small There is little space beside the bed The price is too high for the space provided   Great location very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Noise travels between rooms where there are adjoining doors   This small recently modernised and charming little hotel is right in the heart of Paris only 50 metres from Boulevard St Germain Many of the main sights of the city can be easily walked to It is surrounded by good restaurants and the famous Cafe Deux Magots Cafe Flore and Cafe Procope are all within a 5 minute walk While the rooms are small they are well appointed and comfortable and all bathrooms have apparently only recently been refitted and tiled The reception staff are effervescent to put it mildly and very helpful If the price of breakfast at the hotel seems steep as it did to us there are many alternatives nearby for a coffee and croissant Some rooms like ours 101 have doors to adjoining rooms that apparently can be opened up to make a 2 room suite and the doors between block little sound Our neighbour sometimes sounded as though he was in OUR room Avoid these rooms if possible Notwithstanding this small issue we would not hesitate to stay at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Room was small by U S standards but normal for European standards That is only reason I did not give highest rating for comfort   Great location Approx 3 blocks from river and Luvee Museum Although museum was closed during our stay because of high water level in river Lots of restaurants and shops near by Staff was extra friendly and helpful for an older couple 76 71 who did not speak French Bathroom fixtures were modern Spa tub wonderful after full day of sightseeing Breakfast was good and priced reasonable Mattress was comfortable

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The bed was quite hard but that is to be expected in Europe The bathtub had an auto clean feature that startled me the first time it came on it was temperamental and came on mid shower not a big deal but I could have used a warning   Staff were super friendly and spoke excellent English They make you turn your key card in every time you go out which I thought I might be a bit of a hassle but I ended up really liking it because it was nice being personally greeted each time I came in Room service was great and very accommodating

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: We were there for 3 nights which I booked 2 months in advance which was a big mistake While we were there I checked online and I could have got my first night for nearly half the price I paid and on the other 2 nights they were priced 30 cheaper than we paid Not at all happy about that The bedrooms are very small and too be honest we got more space on a basic cabin on a cruise ship we travelled on recently   Staff were very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Room was small but this is pretty common for Paris so it was in line with my expectations   Great bed and beautiful room Good internet Continental breakfast was a good value especially compared to what was available in the area as alternatives

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The hallway was kinda narrow which I was ok with It s an old building in Paris except the carpet smell and Mr Rude George Security Guy awful attitude and behavior for I don t know what reason Big turn off I wont be back to that property because of him What a nightmare   The room was clean the sheets were crisp and the bed was comfortable The hotel has been remodeled recently so the room looks and feels basically new The front desk Patricia has a great personality very helpful a huge plus for this hotel

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Standard room is small but typical for Paris and Europe in general   English speaking and friendly staff and helpful with directions and restaurant recommendations Latin Quarter is walking distance for some sightseeing Metra is close for the airport and Versailles

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: The staff booked a shuttle for me which had to be canceled I paid in full and they insisted that I did not telling me that they would review the films that they took of me at the front desk All of this in front of another guest It was horrible customer service insulting and humiliating and I would not recommend this hotel for the price you have to pay

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: I like crispy bacon and the bacon was too undercooked for me Everything else was very good   Staff was so friendly and helpful Hotel is beautiful Our room was pretty comfortable and larger than expected

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Nothing to unlike about the hotel staff only 1 flaw was being took back to CDG for our flight to early we had to hang around for 4 hours before our flight as the couples we were traveling to the airport with had flights at 14 30 it would have been a more personal touch to be taken to the airport 2 hours later than we left all to accommodate other passengers  Fantastic layout in Napolionic style decor the staff were more than helpful

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Missing tea service in the room and would have liked breakfast included in the rate  Loved the decor and the location right near everything 10 minute walk to the musee D orsay and 15 minutes to the Louvre Helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Washbasin area was rather cramped and we assumed the spa didn t work on the first night as we were told to press the button The next evening the receptionist clarified that it needed to be stroked and then it worked   We liked the room with its exposed beams and the bed was very comfortable We liked the fact that we could open the bedroom window for fresh air

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: This hotel was super clean and efficient I d like to have had coffee making facilities in the room or downstairs free of charge considering the room rate I think breakfast should be in the room rate then encouraging guests to use the ground floor facilities in the foyer etc a little more I wasn t quite sure if the bar downstairs was for guests to use or not It would have been nice for this to be a little more enticing to sit at the end of a night out or have a drink before going out All in all location room staff were very good

Hotel_Name: Acad mie H tel Saint Germain
Full_Review: Well we have to pay by checking in is that true   One of the reception is super nice she is definitely an additional nice impression of Paris for us And other personal are also really comfortable to talk with Thank you

Full_Review: everything from the rooms to the very friendly and very welcoming staff at the front desk Nothing was too much for them Irene and Anna were wonderful explaining everything both in English and French but mostly their smile and cheerful faces made us feel at home The rooms were very comfortable warm and airy and extremely clean The location was very central to everything we wanted to see and the hotel was classic Thank you all

The service is of above all expectations The rooms are very comfortable with pleasant design and atmosphere as well as the reception and bar zones The staff is polite and ready to support you The director Inna organising the hotel life participates in it personally with kind attention to the questions of the guests Thank you very much for our beautiful stay in your hotel

Asked for dinner with room service the dinner was a little cold plate etc was in plastic beer was not very cold The reception later explained that it is a take away arrangement with a company because the hotel has a bar but no kitchen I would like to have been warned about this A dinner with soup and main course costed 40 euro   Beautiful hotel Got a free upgrade to a spacious by Paris standards room Very clean and elegant Staff extremely nice and friendly

Cleanliness and comfort Safe area close to were my work shop was keeping either walking distance or with easy convenient bus service Walking distance also to the main attraction of Paris the Eiffel Tour

There was no BBC news channel other than French spoken channel We reported to the staff that told us the engineer had checked our room We couldn t get BBC channel in our room because the location of our room The staff didn t think an alternative way to solve the problem which I found slightly disappointed I do stay in the Paris for holiday watching TV isn t a big issue however I do like to know what s going on in the world early in the morning before I get out of the door Especially all the disasters have happened in Paris recently I do recommend the hotel to solve the TV problem out for foreign travellers   The location is brilliant

When we arrived to the hotel it was overbooked They did not have an available room even tough we made a booking couple of months in advance We had to stay the first night in a hotel nearby   When we moved after the first night to this hotel we were given a small present fancy chocolate and a letter of apology We were given also an upgrade to a better room Hotel is OK for Paris standard but I can not understand that you accept a booking and then you do not have an available room

Very very tight rooms and simple furniture I don t understand the French rating system but this one should be a good 3 stars hotel on international standards The breakfast was very small   Location staff and clean

Close by there is a tabac which is a bar where customers bet on all kind of games which usually does not drag the cream of the cream customers Makes the vicinities almost unsafe  The entire staff was INCREDIBLY nice

As far as we could tell the hotel only offers breakfast for lunch dinner or an evening snack you will have to go in the city However being in Paris that is probably something you should be doing anyway   The location is fantastic close to multiple Metro and bus stops and on about a 20 min walk from the Eiffel Tower The room we had was not big but very clean and the bed was very comfortable There was plenty of storage and the bathroom had all the facilities required The breakfast was delicious with enough choice and the staff brings you fresh pastry as soon as you take a seat They also have a small but functional fitness area Staff was helpful polite and friendly Definitely a great hotel to stay
